item.name: Yanxian Softshell
item.description:
The world may be hard and cold, but this turtle's shell is soft...and questionably warm.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Yanxians prize the nutrient-rich meat of softshell turtles, historically imbibing their blood as a cure-all. Judging this to be “savage,” the Empire prohibited the practice upon the region's annexation, and it is yet unclear how this will affect Yanxian tradition long-term.
